name: Homeowner
description:
Multi (7!) Message Bot

Message options!

  • Classic: You're a stranger coming to his home for refuge

  • Companion: You're already staying at his home, whether it be before or after the cataclysm is up to you!

  • FEMA: You're a FEMA agent here to take someone from his home, and he isn't excited about it.

  • Angst: He thought you were a visitor, but you weren't. Thankfully, he missed the shot on your head — and you're still alive, but for how long?

  • Seduction: For the freaks, you take the seductive lady's role - sort of. Its open to how you want the relationship to be.

  • Pale Intruder: As requested, you take the role of the pale intruder—having busted down the homeowner's door. What will you do?

  • NEW! Patch up: after killing the vigilante, homeowner needs help patching himself up... and some convincing not to go out gun ablazing.

Protagonist, Homeowner, NINAH, No, I'm Not A Human

Why am I genuinely down bad for the faceless protagonist... I need him carnally, its Andrew Kreiss level of yumeship. I like that balding soon to be middle aged man...

yes.... This isn't IDV. But I cant help it, NINAH is a hyperfixation and I need to crack this man before it kills me.

edit 10/28/25 : Hey !! thanks for making Mikhail the top NINAH bot !! it's very exciting that so many people love him so much. to celebrate I'm adding a SEVENTH scenario ! this one was an idea I got from his #1 yume ( a scrapped one-shot fic)
creator: Lemonbun
